raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the order of paragraphs and their content.",
    "R1.6": "The agent provides detailed feedback on writing polish, including specific suggestions for hedging, contribution clarity, and tool descriptions, which reads as a careful copy-edit pass.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty about the current capabilities of tools and the novelty claim, providing clear markers of confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within the scope of the requested review, addressing all identified issues without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear source and reason, providing traceability for all recommendations."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the order of paragraphs and their content.
rationale.R1.6: The agent provides detailed feedback on writing polish, including specific suggestions for hedging, contribution clarity, and tool descriptions, which reads as a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty about the current capabilities of tools and the novelty claim, providing clear markers of confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the scope of the requested review, addressing all identified issues without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear source and reason, providing traceability for all recommendations.
